paper.title: Massive stars in the hinterland of the young cluster, Westerlund 2

extraction.summary: Paper studies 40 candidate OB stars around the young massive cluster Westerlund 2. VLT/X-shooter spectroscopy of two O4V stars. Gaia DR2 proper motions suggest 8-11 early O/WR stars ejected from Wd2 in last ~1 Myr (up to ~25% ejection efficiency). These are ordinary cluster runaway stars (velocities ~30-200 km/s from BSE/DE), not Galactic-unbound hypervelocity stars. No star is presented as possibly unbound from the Galaxy.

method_chain.summary: 40 candidate OB stars from Mohr-Smith+2017 (MS-II) VPHAS+ photometric catalog within 1.5x1.5 sq.deg around Wd2. O-star temp range, extinction 5.5<A0<7.5, >10 arcmin from cluster center.
outputs: 40 candidate OB stars in Wd2 hinterland

source_refs.context: Sec 2.2: sample selection criteria around Wd2

method_chain.summary: VLT/X-shooter spectroscopy of two hottest O stars (MS-II #1273, #1338). RV relative to MSP 182: -29.4+/-1.7 and -14.4+/-2.2 km/s.
outputs: RVs and stellar parameters for 2 O stars

source_refs.context: Abstract: X-shooter spectra, RVs of two O stars

method_chain.summary: Gaia DR2 proper motions cross-matched for full sample. PM analysis to identify stars kinematically consistent with Wd2 ejection.

source_refs.context: Abstract: Gaia DR2 PMs, 8-11 stars ejected from Wd2

method_chain.summary: Space motions from Gaia DR2 PMs + X-shooter RVs, Wd2 distance 5+/-1 kpc. Compare with cluster mean PM to identify escapers. 8-11 stars consistent with Wd2 ejection in last 1 Myr.

source_refs.context: Abstract: 8-11 early O/WR stars ejected from Wd2 in last 1 Myr

candidate_groups_considered.description: 40 candidate OB stars in Wd2 hinterland (Table 1). Stars with Gaia DR2 PMs consistent with Wd2 cluster ejection. Ordinary cluster runaway stars with space velocities ~30-200 km/s from BSE/DE mechanisms.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: Paper presents these as cluster runaway/escaped stars from Westerlund 2, not as Galactic-unbound hypervelocity stars. Ejection velocities ~30-200 km/s, well below Galactic escape velocity (~500-600 km/s). No star claimed to be unbound from the Milky Way.

source_refs.context: Abstract: 8-11 ejected from Wd2, ~25% ejection efficiency
Intro: runaway O stars, BSE/DE mechanisms up to 200 km/s
